headline: DoorDash (DASH) Launches Ground Level Images With Precisely For Commercial Property Data
summary: DoorDash and Precisely have launched Ground Level Images, a new high resolution commercial property imagery service. The service uses DoorDash's logistics network to capture on demand images of commercial properties for business customers. Ground Level Images targets use cases across real estate, insurance, retail, telecommunications, and utilities. DoorDash, NasdaqGS:DASH, is using its delivery network in a new way, supplying Precisely with fresh commercial property imagery instead of...
